description: Schema for mq-mcp semantic memory entries in store.json

content.description: Plain text describing the fact, decision, convention, or summary

type.description: Entry classification used for routing and audit

source.description: Where this entry was derived from (file path or doc name)

version.description: mq-mcp version when this entry was created or last verified (semver)

confidence.description: How confident we are that this entry is accurate and current

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the entry was first created

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the entry was last updated

store_format.description: store.json is a JSON object mapping key → entry dict

mq-mcp.tool-count.content: mq-mcp exposes 91 MCP tools across safety classes A-D.
